title: kengyilia alatavica
intro: Kengyilia alatavica, also known as Alataw grass or Kengyilia alatavica, is a type of plant species in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Kengyilia alatavica typically involve drying and processing the plant material into teas, infusions, or extracts for various medicinal uses.
